LAW AND MOTION, 302 DEFENDANT BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTS THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT PRESENTS EVIDENCE THAT MAURIELLO PAID PLAINTIFF SHOWING THERE IS NO CAUSATION OR DAMAGE. (UMF 8 & 13) DEFENDANT ALSO PRESENTS EVIDENCE THAT IT PROVIDED A RESPONSE TO EACH PUBLIC RECORDS ACT REQUEST. (UMF 14-18.) PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSING SEPARATE STATEMENT DOES NOT CITE TO ANY OPPOSING EVIDENCE. (CCP SECTION 437C(B)(3).) DEFENDANT'S ORDER RE OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE SIGNED. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER ON MOTION. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797. (302)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES.

APPEARANCES: Peter Mark Rogosin, 510/433-1160 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Sandra K. Dawes, Esq. of Daley & Heft, LLP 858/755-5666 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTS THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT PRESENTS EVIDENCE THAT MAURIELLO PAID PLAINTIFF SHOWING THERE IS NO CAUSATION OR DAMAGE. (UMF 8 & 13) DEFENDANT ALSO PRESENTS EVIDENCE THAT IT PROVIDED A RESPONSE TO EACH PUBLIC RECORDS ACT REQUEST. (UMF 14-18.) PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSING SEPARATE STATEMENT DOES NOT CITE TO ANY OPPOSING EVIDENCE. (CCP SECTION 437c(b)(3).) Defendant's order re objections to plaintiff's evidence signed. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order on motion. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
